title: On My Desk and Around the Studio
excerpt: I snapped this photo yesterday morning while In the studio, and also decided to do some filming. It turned into a little video tour of my piles and my planners. Clockwise: Otters by Olya | We R Memory Keepers brad…
body:
I snapped this photo yesterday morning while In the studio, and also decided to do some filming. It turned into a little video tour of my piles and my planners. 

Clockwise: Otters by Olya | We R Memory Keepers brad setter | Sakura gel pen | Travelers Factory bag (gift from Sakura-Lala) | Get To Work Book | Frixion erasable pens (I got these from Whim So Doodle in Florida -  you can call them and they will ship to you) Also available here | American Crafts mini stapler | Rifle Paper books (gift from Heidi) | Pineapple card made by Olya

Not pictured but mentioned in the video: Confetti Dori
